reviews.review_msg: AVOID AT ALL COSTS!! It is a waste of your money. Cap is filled with amazing teachers so if you get a chance pick a course taught by ted hamilton. I can't voice enough how frustrated i was by her lack of organization, and lack of talking about material which actually has to do with the course. the only thing she is an expert on is Flickr.

I have taken three courses with Sharla and all i have to say is i do not understand why she still has a job as a teacher. she is beyond useless. Sharla could'nt teach a class if she tried. She not once will be on time, however you can bet she will leave the students waiting 15 minutes at least every day.

She's not that great of a prof.  Her lectures are organized but she puts too much emphasis on art history that doesn't usually have any relevance.  Her assignments and exams are not fun, especially since she doesn't allow a wide range of topics.  She picks one topic and makes everyone write about it.
She talks alot, but also confuses me. I think she just talks about all irrelevant contents instead of useful course content. I learned nothing from her, but alot from the courseware..

Sharla Sava made interesting material dull and monotonous. Her jokes are not funny, and she seems to go off on tangents. I wasn't looking forward to this class going into it, and Sharla didn't help at all. The TA, Nils Olson, however, was a really nice guy who actually enlightened me to the material.
very boring and dry prof. Even though the topics themselves were interesting, she made the material dry. good side is, there is no final exam.
No Comments

TERRIBLE!! SHE'S THE WORST! this class made NO sense whatsoever! i was at almost every lecture, and tutorial, and still could figure out what her point is. The course materials are useless and she doesnt' know what she's talking about. Good Luck!

Worst prof I've had @ SFU.  Extremely boring and at times doesn't seem like she really knows what she's talking about.  She does mix in a lot of art into lecture since thats her background, unfortunately it has no relevance whatsoever to the course material.  I don't think she's mean or anything, she's just a really bad prof.

Fantastic prof. Tries to keep the class light and interesting. Her midterm was ridiculously easy as long as you took notes in class and paid attention to the lecture. The readings are important too, but the level of reading and comprehension she asks for is completely reasonable.
One of the worst teachers I've had in a long time, the material she teaches is so dry and boring. Likes to relate concepts with art works and old clips. Not my style but what the hell
I have to say, for fun things like advertising, she made it very boring. Most people fell asleep half way in the class.
Sharla was the best teacher I ever had - You needn't memorize the text but you'll find she presents the course material so interestingly that you'll want to. Very engaging - unconventional
She is nice, but a VERY hard marker. Her exams are VERY hard and not reasonable. Make sure you memorize the whole text book before the exam.
She was great. I wish i could do the class again this semester!
smart!
No Comments
Made me think.. and i learned a few things 2.   Ain't that why am here ??!? Definately got my $$ worth.
Helps you with the bigger questions in life
No Comments
No Comments
I did not learn a thing
